refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Operational availability depends on both minimizing failure occurrences and reducing repair times. Decomposing the availability KPI into sub-FRs addressing these aspects enables targeted design solutions.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify availability calculation meets or exceeds target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore operation quickly.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault-tolerant hardware and software design to minimize failures.
DP2: Integrate real-time monitoring and automated recovery mechanisms for rapid fault detection and repair.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both failure minimization and rapid recovery.

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and fault tolerance mechanisms.
Dependency on shared system resources for monitoring and recovery.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are complementary and can be modularized to minimize coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable fault detection sensors and monitoring infrastructure.
Risk that recovery mechanisms may not cover all failure modes, impacting availability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider further decomposition if recovery mechanisms become complex or tightly coupled with fault tolerance.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability, integrating fault tolerance and recovery capabilities.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time monitoring data exchange to detect faults and report system status.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands that may affect system availability.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to safety-critical faults impacting availability.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for remote monitoring and teleoperation affecting availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains hardware components but less suitable for system-wide availability logic.
Focuses on remote control, not primary for availability management.
Handles safety alerts but not full availability management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Availability management is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize fault tolerance and recovery logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if availability logic is not well modularized.
Risk of interface overload if too many external dependencies are managed here.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs by addressing failure minimization and rapid recovery.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralization in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via system-level availability testing and monitoring data analysis.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Consider defining sub-modules within NGHE Solution for fault tolerance and recovery to manage complexity.
Ensure interfaces are well specified to avoid overload.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, feasible, and meet containment criteria with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore operation quickly.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Reliable fault detection and monitoring infrastructure is available.
Recovery mechanisms can be effectively implemented within NGHE Solution.
open_risks: Complexity management within NGHE Solution module.
Coverage of all failure modes by recovery mechanisms.
evidence_needed: Availability test results over evaluation period.
Verification of fault detection and recovery effectiveness.
